summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HopeConnect Verified Badge feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all new components work correctly including verified badges, claim forms, admin dashboard tabs, and toggle buttons.
seed_data_creation: Test claims created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified Badge feature fully tested. 1 resource (Central Park Public Restroom) is verified. Multiple test claims exist in the system. All admin endpoints properly protected with 403 for non-admin users.

backend_apis: POST /api/resources/{id}/claim - returns 400 if claim already pending ✅
GET /api/admin/stats - returns verified_resources and pending_claims counts ✅
frontend_ui: Resource cards show verified badge for verified resources ✅
Verified cards have green border/shadow styling ✅
Verified Only filter toggle works on resources page ✅
Admin dashboard shows 3 tabs: Submissions, Verification Claims, All Resources ✅
Admin All Resources tab shows toggle buttons for each resource ✅
Share/QR/Directions buttons still work on resource cards ✅
